title: cyclosorus affinis
intro: Cyclosorus affinis, also known as the Chinese lady fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. It is primarily found in Southeast Asia, particularly in China, India, and Japan. Traditionally, Cyclosorus affinis has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its saponins and flavonoids. The plant's leaves and rhizomes are used to prepare teas, infusions, and decoctions that can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as provide antioxidant and anti-inflammatory benefits.
